description: A plain, undesigned candid color photograph of a middle-aged Hispanic man, shown from the chest up, standing in what appears to be a fluorescent-lit institutional/detention intake room (off-white painted cinderblock walls, a doorway and what looks like paperwork or a poster on the wall behind him). He has short dark hair, a mustache, light stubble, and wears a plain gray crew-neck T-shirt. He looks directly at the camera with a neutral expression in a booking/mugshot-style frontal pose. There is no on-image text, headline, agency seal, border, or graphic styling of any kind. Per the tweet, this depicts Ricardo Crespo-Ruiz, a Mexican national ICE says was convicted of voluntary manslaughter and burglary in Los Angeles, deported, and later caught re-entering with a fake passport.
